title: One of the Last Hogsmeade Weekends
prose: It occurs to you partway through the afternoon that this is very possibly the last time you'll wander this particular high street as a Hogwarts student — the same Honeydukes queue, the same Three Broomsticks table you've claimed a dozen times over the years, all of it about to become something you visit rather than something that's simply yours.
You don't say any of that out loud. It colours the whole afternoon anyway.

choices.label: Take your time and properly savour it.
Decide not to get sentimental about a sweet shop.
